div1.entryFree:
Brain, vb., 1) to kill by beating out the brains: there thou mayst b. him, Tp. III, 2, 96. I could b. him with his lady's fan, H4A II, 3, 24. Figuratively, == to defeat: that --ed my purpose, Meas. V, 401.
2) to conceive in the brain, to understand: such stuff as madmen tongue and b. not, Cymb. V, 4, 147.
